text.tspan: WHY INVERTED? The compiler emits Le (<=) instead of Gt (>).
Le JUMPS when the condition FAILS, skipping ResultRow.
This avoids a separate boolean register + branch.

g.text: Key: WHERE compiles BEFORE output columns (predicate pushdown)
1. Load age from B-tree page (Column 0,1 -> r2)
3. NULL guard: if r2 is NULL -> skip to Next
4. Inverted cmp: if age <= 21 -> skip to Next
5. Load name (Column 0,0 -> r1) -- only if passed filter
7. Next: advance cursor, loop to addr 3
